title: Moderation Update — 2026-04-29 Abuse Queue Triage
body:
Summary of today's abuse queue triage (6 reports processed):

Banned (2):
- spam_wave_42 — Posted phishing links across 6 channels in 20 minutes.
- toxic_runner — Repeated targeted harassment against newcomers.

Warned (2):
- new_member_17 — Off-topic post in #introductions; directed to channel guidelines.
- bot_like_user_77 — Suspicious automation: repeated near-identical replies in help channels.

Closed without action (2):
- trusted_helper (report_003) — False dispute accusation during a moderation disagreement; trusted member, no action taken.
- core_maintainer (report_006) — False positive from brigading users after a moderation decision; trusted member, no action taken.

All 6 reports have been resolved and closed.
